name: Salmon Tagliatelle
recipeIngredient: 213 g Canned Alaska salmon (pink or red)
1 Fresh chili pepper, de-seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the can of salmon and break it into pieces, then set aside.
2. In a saucepan, combine chopped tomatoes, chili peppers, pimento pepper, paprika, onion, courgette, lemon juice, and coriander.
3. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 5 minutes, seasoning as desired.
4. Cook the pasta according to package instructions.
5. Add the salmon and creamed coconut to the sauce, heating gently for 2-3 minutes while stirring lightly.
6. Spoon over the drained pasta and garnish with flaked coconut.
7. Serves 2. Approx. 415 kcals per serving
